Reference No. Final approval (Phase II) has been granted to the new colleges for the academic year 2025â €"2026, as per the Government Decision dated 14.06.2025.
Gaur Arts and Science College, Sevnagar, at A.No.14.2 in the said Government Decision. The college includes Ghatangi, G. Yavatmal.

Principal, Gore Arts and Science College, Sevnagar, Ta. Ghatangi, G. Yavatmal in reference No. 3 vide the above Government Decision, Gore Arts and Science College, AIAN, Dt. The college is named after Ghatangi, G. Yavatmal, Gor College of Arts and Science, Sevnagar, Ta. Ghatangi, G. Yavatmal have requested for repairs.

Accordingly, the University of Sant Gadge Baba Amarathi University, Amravati is required to revise the decision of affiliation on the basis of positive recommendation and examination of relevant documents regarding the change in the name of the college, hence the Government is approving the amendment mentioned in the following statement.
